32 telephone channels bandlimited to 3.6 kHz are to be time division multiplexed by using PCM. If 256 quantization levels are used, the bandwidth of the PCM system with fs = 12 kHz is (assume 1 bit is used to separate every channel and 1 bit is used for synchronization for one period)

Correct answer: C
Solution

(c)

Q3 Not checked
Technical • ELECTRONICS ENGINEERING • +1 / -0
Not attempted

A memoryless source has the alphabet A = {–5, –3, –1, 0 1, 3, 5} with corresponding probabilities {0.05, 0.1, 0.1, 0.15, 0.05, 0.25, 0.3}. Assuming that the source is quantized according to the quantization rule,

The entropy of the quantized source is _______ bits/symbol. (Rounded upto 3 decimal places)

NAT
Correct answer: 1.406 (1.123 - 1.846)
Solution

1.406 (1.123 - 1.846)

Consider the signal s(t) shown in the figure below:

NAT
Correct answer: -1 (-3 - 4)
Solution

Q5 Not checked
Technical • ELECTRONICS ENGINEERING • +1 / -0
Not attempted

An analog signal is sampled, quantized and encoded into a binary PCM wave. The number of representation levels used is 128. A synchronization pulse is added at the end of each code word representing a sample of analog signal. The resulting PCM wave is transmitted over a channel of bandwidth 16 kHz using a quaternary PAM system with raised cosine spectrum and the roll of factor = 1.
The maximum possible value of highest frequency component of the analog signal is ________ kHz.

NAT
Correct answer: 2 (0 - 5)
Solution

2 (0 - 5)

Q6 Not checked
Technical • ELECTRONICS ENGINEERING • +1 / -0
Not attempted

Consider an analog baseband communication system with additive white noise. The transmission channel is assumed to be distortion less, and the power spectral density of white noise is (6 × 10–8) W/Hz. The signal to be transmitted is an audio signal of 3.6 kHz bandwidth. A low pass RC filter with 3 dB bandwidth of 7.2 kHz is placed at receiver end to limit noise power at output. The noise power at the filter output is _________. (Rounded upto two decimal places)

NAT
Correct answer: 1.36 (1.12 - 1.68)
Solution

1.36 (1.12 - 1.68)

Correct answer: C
Solution

(c)
